steps.title: Identify the logical relationship
steps.content: The passage states that guard cells regulate carbon dioxide intake, then introduces a second function: regulating water loss. The blank must signal addition — a second related function of the same cells alongside the first.

steps.title: Eliminate wrong choices and confirm the answer
steps.content:
Evaluate all four choices:
  • Choice A — 'Previously,': signals something that happened earlier in time, but the passage is not presenting a chronological sequence between the two functions. ✗
  • Choice B — 'Additionally,': signals a second related point added to the first, fitting the introduction of a second function of guard cells. ✓
  • Choice C — 'In conclusion,': signals a final summary of an argument, but the passage is not wrapping up a multi-step argument — it is simply listing functions. ✗
  • Choice D — 'Instead,': signals substitution or contrast, implying the second function replaces the first — but both functions coexist simultaneously. ✗
That matches choice B — B is correct.
